creator: root@rahul.net
text:
If anybody is actively investigating this problem report, please let me
know.  Given that I have a debugging kernel in place and lots of traceback
info, this is an opportunity for a softupdate bug to be found and fixed.
However, this is a production machine and I can't afford to have it
crash too often.  So, if it appears that this PR is not being worked
on, I will disable softupdates on the machine to avoid the crashes.

Rahul
